title: 1985 Denver Mini Classic, Boys 10 - 11, Circuit Race Awards Ceremony

enrichment.summary: An announcer reads out the awards ceremony results for the Boys 10-11 Circuit Race at the 1985 Denver Mini Classic bicycle race. Placings are announced from 5th through 1st, with riders receiving ribbons, gift certificates, and a stage winner hat.
enrichment.speaker: other

transcript.text: Boys circuit race the overall awards for the 10-11 boys will be taking will take place after the 12
We need all 12 13 girls to check in at this point for their race which will be taking place after
The award ceremony all 12 13 girls you need to check and we'll be going uh starting from 6th
Place 4 through 6 will receive remins plus a gift certificate from mcdonald's and 3rd through 2nd
Will receive special awards in fifth place we have number 34 tim haugen in fourth place receiving the
Ribbon and the gift certificate will be number 38 kyle pounds now on to the awards blocks receiving
The third place ribbon as well as a five dollar gift certificate from a bike place number 37 eric

Winning this race as well as the first place ribbon and a stage winner hat number 33 mike constantino
The winner of the brilliant park server race today here mike receiving his ribbon and a handshake from
